interpretation.object_sector_cube: Rows are aggregated by typed object path source -> middle -> target; all 216 paths are populated, so the tensor is geometrically live across the full six-sector cube.
interpretation.output_mass_balance: For every output simple gamma, sum_{alpha,beta} p_{alpha,beta}^{gamma} is exactly 2576, the point count in the relation model.
interpretation.transpose_symmetry: The tensor is invariant under (alpha,beta,gamma) -> (beta^vee, alpha^vee, gamma^vee) with the same coefficient.
